📍 Smart Places

Automatic location clusters from your photos' GPS data. Each cluster groups photos within ~1.5 km of each other. Save one as a collection to pin it to your sidebar.

Gold = keeper · Blue 🔒 = you've invested in this photo (tagged / assigned / in collection) — never auto-deleted

Info
Who is this?

Search syntax

Tag & person
tag:beach · photos with the "beach" tag
person:Buğra · photos where this person is identified
folder:family or in:trip2024 · path contains
Date
year:2023 · single year
year:2020-2023 · year range
before:2024-06 / after:2010 · cutoff
date:today · also yesterday, this-week, this-month, this-year, last-week, last-month, last-year (and bugün, dün, bu-hafta, …)
Quality & type
rating:>=4 · 4 stars or more (also <, <=, >, exact)
fav:true · favorites only
media:video or media:image
ext:jpg · file extension
Operators
"red car" · exact phrase
cat* · wildcard prefix (matches catnap, cathedral, …)
cat OR dog · either matches
-night · excludes word
-tag:vacation · excludes a specific tag
Smart matching
Stems & plurals: kediler finds kedi, running finds run
Accent fold: agac finds ağaç (and vice-versa)
Translation: queries in Turkish/non-English are auto-translated and merged
Semantic: CLIP visual search runs in parallel and unique results are appended
Examples
tag:Buğra year:2020-2023 -gece "doğum günü"
person:Lara fav:true date:this-year
media:video rating:>=4
Tip: Ctrl+F focuses the search box.
Drag to select a region. Release, then Save.
Drop to find visually similar photos
Drop folders or images here
They'll be scanned and added to your library

Keyboard Shortcuts

Rating & Favorites
1-5Set star rating (applies to all if 2+ selected) 0Clear rating XReject photo (or batch reject if 2+ selected) FToggle favorite (batch toggle if 2+ selected)
Navigation
J / KNext / Previous photo ← / →Previous / Next photo (also in lightbox) ↑ / ↓Up / Down a row (2D grid nav) N / PNext / Previous untagged photo (skips rejected) ZCenter selected photo in grid Mouse 3/4Back / Forward (side buttons) SpaceOpen lightbox (or play/pause slideshow) EnterOpen in system viewer Home / EndScroll grid top / bottom (lightbox: first / last photo)
Editing
RRotate right 90° Shift+RRotate left 90° TFocus "Add a tag…" input (opens detail panel) Ctrl+TBatch-tag selection (or focus input on single selection) .Re-apply most recently added tag to selection Alt+1-9Apply recent-tag chip at that position (1=top) Ctrl+Alt+CCopy tags from current photo to clipboard Ctrl+Alt+VPaste clipboard tags onto selection DeleteMove selected photo(s) to Recycle Bin (with confirm) Ctrl+ZUndo last action
View & Search
GGallery view DToggle detail panel SCycle sort (Newest→Oldest, Name A→Z, Rating, Tags…) /Focus search [ / ]Grid density smaller / larger Ctrl+ASelect all visible Ctrl+Shift+ADeselect all Ctrl+IInvert selection Ctrl+Shift+CCopy selected photo paths to clipboard Shift+0-5Rating filter: Shift+0 clear, Shift+N = ≥N★ UCycle status filter (All → Untagged → Tagged → All) MCycle media type (All → Image → Video → RAW → All) LFind Similar photos to the selected one (CLIP visual search) EReveal selected photo in Explorer / Finder EscExit Similar-results view → close detail panel → clear multi-selection
Lightbox
+ / -Zoom in / out 0Reset zoom 1–5Set rating (0 is zoom-reset — use grid to clear) HToggle favorite (heart) XReject (rating = -1) FToggle face bounding boxes (click a box to name the person) IToggle EXIF / info overlay panel LFind Similar photos (CLIP visual search) EReveal current photo in Explorer / Finder PToggle Private / Vault Home / EndJump to first / last photo CCopy filename to clipboard Shift+CCopy filename without extension Ctrl+CCopy full path to clipboard Click captionCopy full path (same as Ctrl+C) [ / ]Slideshow −1s / +1s (1–30s) DelMove current photo to trash Shift+← / →Jump ±10 photos (fast scrub) SCopy info snapshot as markdown MCopy as markdown image link ![…](file://…) Shift+MCopy plain file:// URL (no markdown wrapper) ?Open this help pre-filtered to Lightbox keys WheelZoom toward cursor
Modals & Palette
Ctrl+KCommand palette (quick actions) Ctrl+SSettings EscClose modal / detail panel / lightbox ?This help
Face Popup
1-8Apply suggestion chip (when name input is empty) EnterConfirm name

AI Smart Rename

Photo DNA

Health Check

🔗 Missing Files

Scanning…

🎨 Search by Color

Pick a color, adjust the tolerance, find matching photos. Run "Extract Dominant Colors" first — otherwise results will be empty.

📱 Device Detected

Destination folder
Photos are organized by capture date like this:
your_folder / 2026 / 2026-04 - April / IMG_1234.jpg

📱 Import from Phone

Choose a connected device:
Scanning device… iPhone may take a few seconds.
Destination folder
Photos are organized by capture date (2024 / 2024-08 - August / IMG_1234.HEIC).
Importing…
What should I do with the photos on your phone?
Deletion on the phone is permanent. Only the photos you imported are safe in your library — make sure you copied everything you might need.
Face Clusters
Name each group — all photos of the same person will be auto-tagged.
Scanning faces…
Assign Face to Person
📂 Open in Explorer
🖼 Open Image
🔍 Show in Gallery
📋 Copy Path
📋 Copy Filename
🏷 Copy Tags
🏷 Paste Tags
💾 Write XMP Sidecar
📷 View EXIF Data
📁 Add to Collection…
🔍 Find Similar Photos
🔄 Re-tag with AI

🔒 Private Vault

Set a PIN (min 6 chars) to protect private photos. RetinaTag will also generate a 24-word recovery phrase you can use to unlock the same files on another machine.

Type the 24 words from your other machine, then pick a PIN for this device. Same words = same encryption key, so the .rtenc files you brought over will decrypt as-is.

Enter your PIN to unlock the vault.

Forgot PIN? Use 24-word recovery
🔑 Save your 24-word recovery phrase

Write these words down on paper or save them to a password manager. They are the only way to recover your vault if you forget your PIN. RetinaTag never stores them and we cannot email them to you.

🔐 Recover with 24-word phrase

Type the 24 words you saved when you set up the vault, separated by spaces. We’ll let you set a new PIN if it matches.

After verification, you’ll set a new PIN. Your photos stay where they are.
0 private photos
Windows Hello
Checking…
Auto-hide NSFW content
0.22
1 / 1

⚠️ Encrypt vault files at rest?

You have 0 photos in your vault that are still readable from Windows Explorer because their original files aren’t encrypted yet. RetinaTag can fix this by encrypting each one in place (AES-256-GCM) so the bytes on disk become useless without your PIN.

Important: if you forget your PIN and lose your 24-word recovery phrase, the encrypted files cannot be recovered. RetinaTag does not store either of these. Save the recovery phrase before continuing.

Settings

🤖AI & Tagging
📁Library
🔍Search
🏷Display
🔔Notifications
🛠Tools
ℹ️About

AI & Tagging

Configure AI providers and tag output. RetinaTag routes images to the cheapest available provider automatically.

Providers
Output Language
Language of AI-generated tags, descriptions, and locations. Existing tags are not retranslated.
Monthly Budget
Set 0 for unlimited. AI tagging stops when the monthly cost exceeds this limit.

Library

Folders RetinaTag watches and how new device imports are handled.

Watch Folders
RetinaTag scans these folders on startup and watches for changes while running.
Device Import (USB / SD)
Ask when a device is detected
Photos go into date-taken YYYY / YYYY-MM - Month folders.
📱 iPhone: Doesn't appear as a removable drive on Windows (MTP). Add your iCloud Photos folder as a Watch Folder instead.

Search

Semantic visual search with CLIP — finds photos by content, not just tags.

CLIP Semantic Index

AI that understands photos without tags — finds them even without keywords. Pick a model and index your library. Try queries like "sunset over the sea" or "red dress in winter".

— Indexing runs automatically after tagging

Display

How tags and photos are presented in the UI.

Minimum Tag Confidence
Hides low-confidence AI tags everywhere. Manually-added tags always show.

Notifications

Tray behaviour and desktop notifications.

Tray & Background
Closing the window hides RetinaTag to the system tray so watch-folder scans keep running. Right-click the tray icon to quit.

Tools

Maintenance utilities and the scan history log.

Maintenance
Re-render thumbs of photos whose EXIF orientation is non-trivial.
Wipes the thumb cache; slow on large libraries.
Find orphaned entries and missing thumbnails.
Re-import GPS data embedded in each photo.
Enables the "search by color" feature.
⚠ DANGEROUS — permanently removes every tag (AI + manual). Cannot be undone.
📜 Scan History
Last 50 scans

About

App version, GPU acceleration, updates.

Version
RetinaTag v—
Automatic Updates
Silently looks for new releases when RetinaTag launches and offers a one-click install. Updates are signed and downloaded directly from GitHub.
GPU Acceleration
Checking...

Welcome to RetinaTag

AI-powered photo tagging with smart multi-provider routing.
Your library, analyzed — beautifully.

🧠

5 AI Providers

Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Grok and local Qwen2.5-VL free.

🌍

Any Language

Search in Turkish, Japanese, Arabic — auto-translates.

⚡

Smart Routing

Always picks the cheapest provider. Near-zero cost.

🗺

GPS Map & EXIF

See where photos were taken. Full EXIF metadata.

1
Add API keys in Settings or use free local Qwen2.5-VL
2
Click Add Folder or drop images onto the window
3
Hit Tag with AI and watch your library come alive

🏷 Tag Manager

📷 EXIF Data

📦 Export Library

Export all photos and tags to a file. Choose format:

Storage mode
⚠ Deletes every .xmp file in your library folders (originals untouched). Use after switching to "Embed only" mode.
💾 Metadata Backup
Saves all your tags, ratings, favorites, descriptions, and person names keyed by file hash. Restoring finds files by content — works even if you've moved them. Thumbnails regenerate automatically.
↑↓ navigate · Enter select · Esc close Ctrl+K to reopen
